fn find_by_index(items: &[String], indices: &[usize]) -> Vec<&str> {
    indices.iter()
        .filter_map(|&idx| items.get(idx))
        .map(|s| s.as_str())
        .collect()
}

fn pick_elements(data: &[u64], positions: &[usize]) -> Vec<u64> {
    positions.iter()
        .filter_map(|&i| data.get(i))
        .copied()
        .collect()
}
